{{CargoRelic
|name=The Dance
|class_id=22527
|rank=A
|affct=ART
|birthday=09-20
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.55%)
|description=On Sept 20, 1909 AD, Matisse began to paint this work upon receiving a commission from a businessman.<br>This oil painting is one of the representative works of the famous Fauvist painter Matisse. With smooth lines and simple colors, the work depicts five women dancing crazily in a circle, perfectly expressing the vitality of life and displaying the painter's personal style with advanced artistic ideas that boldly break with tradition.
|fame=30
|art=62
|fth=40
|civ=43
|tech=38
|ss1=Domain Cabin Output +1%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +4
|ss2=Domain Cabin Output +2%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +8
|ss3=Domain Cabin Output +3%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +12
|ss4=Domain Cabin Output +5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +20
|ss5=Domain Cabin Output +7%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28
|ss7=Domain Cabin Output +7%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: This Relic's ART +10
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x INTEL Drops +3%
}}
